evidence: "If you love your American history, and are an avid Civil War buff, then this is the movie for you!"
"It's hard to beat Tom Selleck and Sam Elliott in a good ol' western."
"The story is really good but the movie just ends too quickly."
"This is a very fun movie. All the grandkids just love it."
"The movie, because of the content, the telling of the story of Genghis Kahn's life and what he did, was very long."
"The CGI in the movie is so fantastic, so real!"
"The story, the music and the characters are priceless!!"
"I have always been a huge Charlton Heston fan, and this movie doesn't disappoint."
"It's hard to beat Tom Selleck and Sam Elliott in a good ol' western."
"The scenery is just beautiful, and the actors are quaint."
"The strength of those people in WW2, and what they had to endure is what this story is all about."
"The story lets you into an Irish family and warms your heart."
"You just feel wonderful after watching it!!!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical and war-themed movies, particularly those with emotional depth and high production quality. They enjoy simple narratives that evoke strong feelings and appreciate visual spectacle, especially in well-crafted stories.
